economic_notes: Nation operates fishing enterprises (crab, lobster, shrimp), forestry, tourism/interpretation site, maple grove (érablière), and economic development activities. Fishing quotas (crab, lobster, shrimp) granted by DFO at no monetary consideration. Subsidiary: Organisme de développement économique et communautaire Mic-Mac de Gaspé inc. (100% consolidated).
notes: Audit qualified opinion: fishing quotas (intangible assets valued at $4,681,000) are recorded on the balance sheet contrary to Canadian public sector accounting standards which require intangible assets to be expensed; accumulated surplus and assets would be reduced by $4,681,000 if compliant. Same qualification existed in prior year 2021. Fishing quotas not amortized due to indefinite useful life. Nation has a trust fund managed by ISC not presented in financial statements (balance $23,793). Long-term debt includes a loan guaranteed by SAA where principal and interest payments are made directly by SAA. Two lawsuits totaling approximately $132,500 regarding mandate terminations. Deferred revenue (passif au titre des paiements de transfert) of $1,333,445. total_government_transfers calculated as: ISC $1,909,494 + DEC operating $107,300 + DEC capital $115,974 + SAA operating $5,187 + CDRH operating $295,789 + SAA capital $127,154 + CDRH capital $81,447 + Autres subventions $1,797,882 - note autres subventions may include non-government sources; OSR calculated as total revenue minus identifiable government transfers excluding autres subventions which may be mixed.
